question: Which modern award and code covers the Health Professionals and Support Services Award?
expected_answer: Health Professionals and Support Services Award (MA000027)

assert.input: Health Professionals and Support Services Award MA000027

source: Fair Work Ombudsman Pay Guide MA000027, published 24 June 2026

question: If a user says their award is the "Fast Food Industry Award", should the Health Professionals and Support Services Award answer their pay questions?
expected_answer: No — that is a different award; the assistant must not answer from this award’s data.
source: Fair Work Ombudsman Pay Guide MA000027, published 24 June 2026

question: What is the casual loading under the Health Professionals and Support Services Award?
expected_answer: 25% (a casual is paid 25% on top of the minimum hourly rate).
source: Fair Work Ombudsman Pay Guide MA000027, published 24 June 2026
